name: l2_powered_source_shaft_power_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceShaftPowerBudget compares reaction torque shaft power against axial and swirl wake power demand.
note: Primary powered source rotor-side energy budget.

name: rotor_spec
value: RotorSpec supplies max angular velocity yaw torque per thrust and blade geometry station parameters.

name: drone_config
value: DroneConfig supplies preset rotors battery limits and powered rotor constants.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover spin ratio source terms and momentum power.

name: l2_powered_hover_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverWakeFootprint supplies hover mass flow and contracted wake radius.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies cruise spin ratio source terms and momentum power.

name: l2_powered_cruise_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseWakeFootprint supplies cruise mass flow and contracted wake radius.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for future powered source wake power evidence.

name: hover

name: all_spin_states
note: Maximum shaft power fraction of battery limit.

name: shaft_power_budget_rule
value: Do not treat powered-source wake targets as physically calibrated until reaction-torque shaft power live telemetry and motor torque coefficients can pay for axial plus swirl wake power demand for every preset.
note: Acceptance rule for rotor-side energy budget.
